ROOM FEATURES

CLASSIC ROOM

Private Bathroom
Hot water
Smart TV 50″
WiFi free
Wake-up service
Hair dryer
Ironing set on request
Heating
In-room safe deposit box
In-room telephone

PREMIUM ROOM

Private Bathroom
Hot water
Smart TV 50″
WiFi free
Wake-up service
Hair dryer
Ironing set on request
Heating
In-room safe deposit box
In-room telephone

ADDITIONAL SERVICES

  • Magnifying mirror for makeup or shaving
  • Remodeled bathrooms with Italian porcelain from floor to ceiling
  • Bathrobes
  • Slippers
  • Cotton Towels
  • Enhanced bathroom amenities selection
  • Telephone in the bathroom
  • Preferential location
  • Connecting rooms (upon prior request)
  • 50" Smart LED TV
  • Complimentary airport-hotel transfers
  • Minibar
  • "Pacific Coast" white goose down comforters
  • Welcome water bottle
  • Larger rooms
  • Infusion kit

Hot water

Wake-up service

Heating

In-room telephone
